source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage to Crane/Drawworks

event.top_event: Uncontrolled descent of topdrive and traveling block
actions_taken: Enterprise crew used off-side drawworks brake to slow and control descent
Non-OEM retention roll pin replaced with OEM parts
HSE Bulletin (Safety Alert 1017) released on 19 September 2019
event.summary: On 11 September 2019 at approximately 13:00 hours, while making up for a casing run on the Enterprise 263 jack-up rig, the driller's-side drawworks brake became non-responsive. The topdrive and traveling block began to descend uncontrollably. The driller used the off-side drawworks brake to slow the descent. The topdrive struck the top of the 7.625-inch casing in the hole and the traveling block fell against the casing stabbing board. Investigation revealed a non-OEM stainless steel retention roll pin had broken, causing brake band separation. Post-incident investigation found incorrect retaining roll pins installed in both drawworks brake band assemblies instead of required OEM cotter pins. No injuries occurred.
recommendations: BSEE Safety Alert No. 369 issued on 25 October 2019 informing operators of hazards of using non-OEM parts

threats.name: Retention roll pin breakage due to non-OEM specification
Brake band separation from brake drum
Loss of braking ability on driller's-side drawworks
Misalignment of pin holes preventing proper OEM installation

consequences.name: Topdrive and traveling block descent striking casing
Damage to non-OEM retention roll pin
Potential personnel injury from falling equipment

controls.name: Drawworks brake system (driller's-side)
controls.barrier_role: Primary braking control to prevent uncontrolled load descent
controls.lod_basis: Primary mechanical brake system designed to control load descent

supporting_text: the driller's-side drawworks brake became non-responsive
the Enterprise Driller was able to use the off-side drawworks brake to slow and control the descent
the driller's-side retention roll pin located on the drawworks drum brake band assembly was broken

controls.name: Drawworks brake system (off-side)
controls.barrier_role: Secondary braking control to arrest uncontrolled load descent
controls.lod_basis: Redundant brake system providing backup braking capability

supporting_text: the Enterprise Driller was able to use the off-side drawworks brake to slow and control the descent of the topdrive and traveling block

controls.name: Preventative maintenance program for drawworks
controls.barrier_role: Identify and prevent brake system degradation through scheduled maintenance
controls.lod_basis: Scheduled maintenance to detect component wear and failure before critical loss of function

supporting_text: on 15 August 2019, an Enterprise Mechanic had discovered the drawworks brake band retention roll pin was backing out on the off-side brake band assembly
Enterprise's preventative maintenance program did not include the identification of a non-original equipment manufacturer (OEM) parts that did not meet manufacturer specifications

controls.name: OEM parts specification and installation requirements
controls.barrier_role: Ensure correct parts meeting manufacturer specifications are installed to maintain brake system integrity
controls.lod_basis: Manufacturer specifications ensure component compatibility and performance

supporting_text: an incorrect retention roll pin was installed in place of the required OEM brake band 5/16-inch by 4-inch retention cotter pin
technicians were unable the line up the pin holes on the OEM retaining pins
incorrect retaining roll pins were installed in both drawworks brake band assemblies instead of the required OEM brake band 5/16-inch by 4-inch retention cotter pins

controls.name: Supervision of maintenance and equipment installation
controls.barrier_role: Ensure proper procedures and OEM specifications are followed during equipment maintenance and installation
controls.lod_basis: Management oversight to verify compliance with technical requirements

supporting_text: Byron failed to provide adequate supervision when a non-OEM retention roll pin was installed in the drawworks brake band assembly

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
